title: Trump Suggestion of a Syrian Crackdown on Hezbollah Confounds Many in Mideast
summary_full: During peace talks, President Trump repeatedly floated the idea that Syria could help subdue Hezbollah in Lebanon. The proposal revived bitter memories.
summary_public: During peace talks, President Trump repeatedly floated the idea that Syria could help subdue Hezbollah in Lebanon. The proposal revived bitter memories.
